title: ascotainia elmeri
intro: Ascotainia elmeri, also known as the Elmer's Ascotainia or Elmer's Velvet Bean, is a plant species belonging to the Fabaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant is known to possess medicinal properties, particularly its seeds contain a compound called rotenone, which exhibits insecticidal and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Ascotainia elmeri include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and snake bites, as well as its use as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or poultices to utilize its medicinal properties, however, more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
